name: split-calculator
description: Computes the minimal list of transfers (who pays whom and how much) from how much each participant spent, using greedy transaction minimization.

participants.description: List of participants with their spending.

items.name: string — participant name
items.paid: number — how much the person actually paid

outputs.transfers: array of { from, to, amount } — payments to execute
outputs.balances: object — balance (positive receives / negative pays) per participant
